Join us at a Guards Game!.body: Join us at a Guardians game! [July 17th against Pittsburgh, choose the district ticket](https://mlb.tickets.com/?agency=MLB_MPV&orgid=27&pid=9658549&tfl=Cleveland_Guardians-Tickets-Buy_Guardians_Tickets-Single_Game_Tickets_Buy_Tickets_Button-x0-Desktop-Landscape&adobe_mc=MCMID=84298707086762672553592245839150769889|MCORGID=A65F776A5245B01B0A490D44%40AdobeOrg|TS=1780794896). More info on a District ticket: https://www.mlb.com/guardians/tickets/district-ticket. Wear your Arsenal colors! After all it will match, especially if you throw in some blue. Also, here is a Google Calendar invite to keep you up to date https://calendar.app.google/7XdscuR4rCcaxrgs9
Join us at a Guards Game!.pushMessage: July 17th against Pittsburgh, see you in the district section!

New Kits!.body: New Kits! The kits commemorating this 'Hell of a Season' are available to order online from RYCO (just a couple blocks over on Madison in fact) so order yours [here](https://rycosportslw.com/clubs/cleveland-gunners/) and you can have it delivered or pick it up before the match!

Arsenal America Membership.body: Arsenal America's 2026/27 membership sign ups are Available! You get access to tickets, discounts, perks, and a nationwide fan community [Sign Up Here](https://arsenalamerica.com/become-a-member/)

cheers.body:
On March 1st the day of the match against Chelsea, we are partnering with [Cleveland Scores](https://americascorescleveland.org/)
There will be a to benefit raffle to the organization. Win prizes. Support SCORES

Food Bank.body: It wasn't that long ago that our great city became the face of the loss of SNAP benefits. While many other places across the country also had this issue, it's a good reminder that you can make a difference. Join us and donate. [Cleveland Food Bank](https://support.greaterclevelandfoodbank.org/site/TR?pg=personal&px=2782648&fr_id=1280)

Scarves.body: Scarves! $20 a piece available from Jason on Match Day! Until supplies last
